user.title: NILM Backend Connection
user.description: Connect to your NILM Docker container.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the NILM Docker container.
data_description.port: API port of the NILM container (default 8000).
data_description.power_entity_id: Home Assistant entity providing aggregate power in Watts.
data_description.data_push_interval: Hours between power data pushes to the container.

model.title: Select Model
model.description: Pick an existing model or create a new one.

data_description.model_name: Select a model to load on the container.

new_model.title: Create New Model
new_model.description: Enter a name for the new model to create on the container.

data_description.new_model_name: Name of the model to create (or load if it already exists).

appliances.title: Select Appliances
appliances.description: Choose which appliances from the model you want to monitor. Deselect any that are not present in your home.

data_description.enabled_appliances: Select all appliances present in your household.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the NILM backend. Check host and port.
error.no_models: Connected but no models found on the backend.
error.model_required: Select an existing model or enable new model creation.
error.new_model_name_required: Enter a name for the new model.
error.invalid_model_name: Invalid name. Use letters, digits, '-' or '_' (1-64 chars, must start alphanumeric).
error.model_load_failed: The backend could not load the selected model. Check the server logs.
